inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Patient age in years. Used in Hofstetter's formulas for accommodative amplitude.

businessContext_i18n.en: Patient age in years. Used in Hofstetter's formulas for accommodative amplitude.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hastanın yaşı (yıl cinsinden). Hofstetter formüllerinde akomodasyon genliği için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Patientenalter in Jahren. Wird in den Hofstetter-Formeln für die Akkommodationsamplitude verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hastanın yaşı (yıl). Akomodasyon genliği için Hofstetter formüllerinde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del paciente en años. Se utiliza en las fórmulas de Hofstetter para la amplitud acomodativa.

inputs.label: Refractive Error
inputs.businessContext: Refractive error in diopters (D). Negative for myopia, positive for hyperopia. Typically the distance prescription.

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive error in diopters (D). Negative for myopia, positive for hyperopia. Typically the distance prescription.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diyoptri (D) cinsinden kırma kusuru. Miyopi için negatif, hipermetropi için pozitif. Genellikle uzak gözlük reçetesidir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Refraktionsfehler in Dioptrien (D). Negativ für Myopie, positiv für Hyperopie. Typischerweise die Fernbrille.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diyoptri (D) cinsinden refraktif hata. Miyopi için negatif, hipermetropi için pozitif. Genellikle uzak gözlük reçetesi.
businessContext_i18n.es: Error refractivo en dioptrías (D). Negativo para miopía, positivo para hipermetropía. Generalmente la prescripción de lejos.

inputs.label: Amplitude Method
inputs.businessContext: Select method for calculating accommodative amplitude. 1: Hofstetter minimum (15 - 0.25*age), 2: Hofstetter average (18.5 - 0.30*age), 3: Hofstetter maximum (25 - 0.40*age), 0: Direct input using 'directAmplitude'.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select method for calculating accommodative amplitude. 1: Hofstetter minimum (15 - 0.25*age), 2: Hofstetter average (18.5 - 0.30*age), 3: Hofstetter maximum (25 - 0.40*age), 0: Direct input using 'directAmplitude'.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akomodatif genlik hesaplama yöntemini seçin. 1: Hofstetter minimum (15 - 0.25*yaş), 2: Hofstetter ortalama (18.5 - 0.30*yaş), 3: Hofstetter maksimum (25 - 0.40*yaş), 0: 'directAmplitude' kullanarak doğrudan giriş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Methode zur Berechnung der Akkommodationsamplitude auswählen. 1: Hofstetter Minimum (15 - 0,25*Alter), 2: Hofstetter Durchschnitt (18,5 - 0,30*Alter), 3: Hofstetter Maximum (25 - 0,40*Alter), 0: Direkteingabe mit 'directAmplitude'.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez la méthode de calcul de l'amplitude accommodative. 1 : Minimum de Hofstetter (15 - 0,25*âge), 2 : Moyenne de Hofstetter (18,5 - 0,30*âge), 3 : Maximum de Hofstetter (25 - 0,40*âge), 0 : Saisie directe via 'directAmplitude'.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione el método para calcular la amplitud acomodativa. 1: Mínimo de Hofstetter (15 - 0.25*edad), 2: Promedio de Hofstetter (18.5 - 0.30*edad), 3: Máximo de Hofstetter (25 - 0.40*edad), 0: Entrada directa usando 'amplitudDirecta'.

inputs.label: Direct Amplitude
inputs.businessContext: Direct accommodative amplitude in diopters (D). Used only when Amplitude Method is 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct accommodative amplitude in diopters (D). Used only when Amplitude Method is 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diyoptri (D) cinsinden doğrudan akomodatif genlik. Yalnızca Genlik Yöntemi 0 olduğunda kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Akkommodationsamplitude in Dioptrien (D). Wird nur verwendet, wenn die Amplitudenmethode 0 ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Amplitude accommodative directe en dioptries (D). Utilisée uniquement lorsque la méthode d'amplitude est 0.
businessContext_i18n.es: Amplitud acomodativa directa en dioptrías (D). Se usa solo cuando el Método de Amplitud es 0.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
